mapper.sql: t.id, t.project_id AS projectId, p.name AS projectName, t.title, t.description, t.status, t.priority, t.assignee_id AS assigneeId, COALESCE(u.name, '미지정') AS assigneeName, t.due_date AS dueDate, t.created_at AS createdAt
FROM tasks t INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = t.project_id INNER JOIN teams te ON te.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = t.assignee_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks ( project_id, title, description, status, priority, assignee_id, created_by, due_date, created_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{assigneeId}, #{createdBy}, #{dueDate}, NOW() )
